description: §6.9 / §48.6.4 fn file-scope hoist — `fn` declarations at file scope hoist per §6.9, mirroring `function`; mutual recursion works without source-order constraints. isEven references isOdd declared LATER; both compile clean (no forward-ref / scope error).
rationale: §48.6.4: `fn` declarations at file scope hoist per §6.9, so isEven can call isOdd (declared after it). Mutual recursion of `fn` is supported without source-order constraints; no diagnostic fires.
